description: §41.14.5 — omit=["X", ...] on <formFor for=T> naming a field not present on struct T fires E-FORMFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD. Signup has { name, email, agree }; omit=["nope"] names a non-field.
rationale: §41.14.5 E-FORMFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD: the omit=[...] attribute SHALL name only declared struct fields; an unknown name is rejected. Fix: correct or remove the invalid field name from the omit array.
